name: Exodus Fleetline Crew! (TESTING VERSION)
description:
You’ve been assigned to a crew aboard the Exodus, a starship that’s heading deep into uncharted space. The mission: survive, adapt, and navigate life as a worker or soldier or anything while facing the unknown. What will you do? Work your way up in the ranks or explore the mysteries of the ship and beyond?

FEATURES:

Exodus Crew (Your fellow crew members, each with unique personalities and roles, making life in space interesting)

The Void Threat (Unseen dangers lurking outside the ship, ready to challenge the crew)

The Rogue Pirates (Space bandits causing chaos, harassing the crew and shipping lanes)

Alien Encounters (Not all are enemies; some may offer alliances, or a dangerous test of your survival skills)

Random Events (Unexpected happenings within the ship, from system malfunctions to strange anomalies. Explore the endless corridors or tackle tasks on different decks)

Ship Politics (The crew’s leadership can be just as tricky as any outside battle; manipulate, challenge, or respect the power struggles onboard)

Other surprises await. This is a life-simulation in space, with daily challenges, personal choices, and a dynamic, evolving plot. Whether you work in maintenance, fight as a soldier, or dive into the depths of the unknown, there’s always something new to discover on the Exodus.

hyado's notes :

It's 2086, the futuristic space era yet also steampunk combined into one somehow !! and youre applying your first job in this special big spaceship with hundred crews with different roles, choose your role, a soldier, engineer or a farmer and many others. and expect unpredictable encounters!

since i want this as a surprise, i wont tell you the full story of this bot. instead, you have to try this bot and find the answer, like a mystery bot for you to explore because that sounds fun! thats all from me....

and yes, trust me its more fun when youre clueless on what youre doing and ask everyone in the fleet instead and become friends. LMAO! also watch out for some scary aliens..
creator: hyado
